##SOURCE=Lawrence W. Snee
##DESCRIPTION=Green hexagonal prisms in a muscovite schist, variety emerald. Note that there are micro inclusions of actinolite. The Raman signal is a mixture of the two phases.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060944
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Be_3.00_(Al_1.59_Mg_0.33_Fe^3+^_0.04_Cr^3+^_0.04_)Si_6.00_O_180.33_ ; bright inclusions are actinolite
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.2527 b: 9.2527 c: 9.1971 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 681.89 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=785
